asset.title: L4 Draft
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the concept of an agent handling locked ranges, but contains a duplicate step in the sequence animation.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly shows the transition of a row to a locked state and the agent's response.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the progression from goal to completion, though the final drafted value is not visually shown in the cell.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode layout with clear highlighting of the active row.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the versioning and multi-agent collaboration narrative.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Functions well as a conceptual workflow diagram, though it is a simplified simulation.

legibility.evidence: Text and status indicators are highly readable with good contrast.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts managing shared model updates.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly presented as a step-by-step conceptual flow rather than live UI capture.

observedEvidence: Locked status highlight on the Net Income row
AI agent status bar at the bottom
missingEvidence: Visual representation of the drafted value or the final smart-merge proposal screen

defects.observed: Step 3/5 duplicates the text and action of Step 1/5 ('locks the affected range - read-only for others').
defects.fix: Remove the duplicate step or update Step 3/5 to show a unique progression in the workflow.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: NodeRoom agent automatically drafting updates for a locked cell to prepare for a smart-merge once unlocked.
